data.title: XRP’s Quiet Phase May Be Setting Up A Sudden Breakout: Expert
data.description:
XRP’s next big rise could come with hardly any warning, traders and analysts warn. Markets are quiet now. That quiet has happened before, and it has sometimes been followed by sharp moves that catch most people off guard. Related Reading: Bitcoin Senses Risk As Trump Balks At Europe With Major Tariffs History Of Sudden Moves According to several community analysts, XRP has a pattern of long quiet periods followed by fast spikes
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/altcoin/xrps-quiet-phase-may-be-setting-up-a-sudden-breakout-expert/

data.title: CME Predicts High Probability of Fed Rate Stability in January
data.description: CME's "FedWatch" tool indicates a 95% chance that the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates unchanged in January. According to ChainCatcher, there is a 5% probability of a 25 basis point rate cut. By March, the likelihood of a cumulative 25 basis point cut stands at 20.6%, while the probability of maintaining the current rate is 78.5%. The chance of a cumulative 50 basis point reduction is 0.9%.

data.title: Quantum Computing's Potential Impact on Bitcoin's Security
data.description: Crypto analyst Jamie Coutts has updated his perspective on the risks posed by quantum computing to Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, Coutts emphasizes the challenges arising from Bitcoin's decentralized governance structure. Unlike traditional financial institutions that can swiftly adapt through centralized decision-making, Bitcoin's upgrade process is slow and intricate, lacking a unified authority. Although the timeline for the advent of quantum computing remains uncertain, its potential impact on decentralized networks like Bitcoin could be significant due to delayed risk responses.

data.title: Glassnode Flags XRP Structure Matching Feb 2022 Pre-Crash Setup
data.description:
Blockchain analytics firm Glassnode warned on Monday that XRP’s on-chain market structure mirrors the exact cost-basis configuration observed before a 60% price collapse in 2022. XRP is trading at $1. 91, down 4. 74% in the past 24 hours. The signal centers on the holder’s cost basis. Wallets active in the 1-week to 1-month window are now accumulating below […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/glassnode-flags-xrp-structure-matching-feb-2022-pre-crash-setup/
